name: New items
description: Products just introduced in stock: no past sales and no stock six months ago.

name: Fast movers
description: High rotation products with less than 2 months of stock coverage.

name: Normal rotation
description: Regular rotation between 2 and 6 months of coverage.

name: Slow movers
description: Slow rotation between 6 and 12 months of coverage.

name: Non-movers
description: Dormant stock: over 12 months of coverage or no sales over the last year.
